steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content: The line contains $(-2,7)$ and $(4,-1)$. Its slope is $$m=\frac{-1-7}{4-(-2)}=\frac{-8}{6}=-\frac{4}{3}.$$

steps.title: Use the fastest choice check
steps.content: Only the equation with slope $-\frac{4}{3}$ can work, so once the slope is found, the other choices are eliminated immediately. The intercept calculation confirms that choice C also passes through the given points.
